properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Out on the highways and byways of life, Many are the weary and sad; Carry the sunshine where darkness is rife, Making the sorrowing glad.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Make me a blessing, make me a blessing; Out of my life may Jesus shine. Make me a blessing, O Saviour I pray, Make me a blessing to someone today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Tell the sweet story of Christ and His love, Tell of His pow'r to forgive; Others will trust Him if only you prove True every moment you live.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Give as'twas given to you in your need, Love as the Master loved you; Be to the helpless a helper indeed, Unto your mission be true.
